orig_text:
f the bind was successful, the resultCode will be success, therwise it will be 
one of:
correct_text:
If the bind was successful, the resultCode will be success, otherwise it will be 
one of:
notes: The sentence is missing an 'I' for 'If' and an 'o' for 'otherwise'.
